title: The Source of Naming Where Silence Still Echoes

features.name: the first empty slot
features.desc-on-touch: a place where a name should be, but is not; the silence here is so clean it has its own echo

features.name: the rows of unspoken words
features.desc-on-touch: a plantation of words that decided never to be said; each one stands in its row and holds the shape of what it didn't become

features.name: the echo of the first silence
features.desc-on-touch: before there were names, there was a silence that named itself; this is what it sounded like, or what it still sounds like

inscription: naming begins here, or doesn't; each name you don't speak is one the silence keeps forever

file.name: UnspokenWords_Registry_Primordial.txt
file.note: what is written here is invisible; the words decided never to leave the silence

exits.label: back down to where names remember being words
up toward a name that is still being spoken
along the plantation where every row is a word that almost was
